steps.title: Recall the mean formula
steps.content:
The mean of a set of values is the sum of the values divided by the number of values:
$$\text{mean} = \frac{\text{sum of times}}{\text{number of tasks}}$$

steps.title: Apply to the data
steps.content:
Adding the five task times in the table and dividing by $5$ gives:
$$\text{mean} = \frac{35}{5} = 7 \text{ minutes}$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
